prompt:
Generate one standalone 16:9 Chinese methodology infographic mapping an entire reading journey logic.

Visual Style:
Pure white background, clean and minimalist. Warm hand-drawn sketch style with soft pencil/ink lines and colored-pencil/light watercolor textures. Sparse, cozy hand-drawn details. High contrast but soft coloring. No complex shadows, no paper textures, no vector illustrations, no PPT slide structures.

Typography & Title:
At the top, a prominent handwritten bold Chinese title: "加缪情书集" with a cute hand-drawn spark next to it. Below it, a smaller handwritten Chinese subtitle: "从冷面哲学家到深情爱人的阅读路径".
CRITICAL TYPOGRAPHY RULE: ALL Chinese text, titles, subtitles, and labels on the image MUST be strictly rendered in a cute, rounded, bold handwritten font (handwritten Chinese calligraphy style). Absolutely NO clean digital computer font rendering (such as HeiTi, SongTi, Arial). The font must look 100% manually drawn.

Layout & Logic Flow:
A structured diagram showing 4 rounded hand-drawn boxes connected by curving orange flow arrows to represent a clear left-to-right progression.
In the center or transition area, show a small connection box: "一收一放 → 错位的契合".

Box 1: "刻板印象"
- Marked with a colored badge circled number "1".
- Subtitle: "冷面哲学家".
- Inside sketch: A serious silhouette of a man standing alone at a distance, representing the public image of Camus as a cold absurdist philosopher.

Box 2: "翻开书页"
- Marked with a colored badge circled number "2".
- Subtitle: "发现另一个加缪".
- Inside sketch: An open book with warm golden light radiating upward from its pages.

Box 3: "玛丽亚·烈火型"
- Marked with a colored badge circled number "3".
- Subtitle: "怕沉默，不怕距离".
- Inside sketch: A burning love letter with soft flames wrapping around it, representing passionate fearless self-expression.

Box 4: "加缪·克制型"
- Marked with a colored badge circled number "4".
- Subtitle: "怕沉溺，一半滚烫一半负罪".
- Inside sketch: A hand holding a fountain pen hesitantly over a half-written letter, the left side in warm light and right side in cool shadow.

Characters & IP:
Include two characters placed naturally in the scene:
1. A cute hand-drawn girl with long straight dark brown hair (center part, no bangs), wearing a thick white knit sweater with visible cable-knit texture and light-colored pants. She has a warm smile and round gentle face, looking curiously at the diagram.
2. A cute simple white helper robot with a rounded head and two small antennas on top, rectangular screen face with two dot eyes, placed near the girl.
CRITICAL: Do NOT write any name label such as "嗯哌" anywhere on the image.

Color Palette:
Dark gray outlines. Soft pink/peach for skin and character warmth. Pastel blue, yellow, and green tints inside step badges/boxes. Curving flow arrows in light hand-drawn orange. Sparse red markings for key emphasis.

Constraints:
Ensure the layout is spacious and readable. All Chinese titles and annotations must be beautifully handwritten. The entire structure must feel logically clear, structured, and easy to follow at a glance. Do not print any raw English tags like Box 1 or Box 2. All text shown on the image must be in Chinese.

Generate one standalone 16:9 Chinese methodology infographic about the hidden cost of longing in a long-distance love.

Visual Style:
Pure white background, clean and minimalist. Warm hand-drawn sketch style with soft pencil/ink lines and colored-pencil/light watercolor textures. Sparse, cozy hand-drawn details. High contrast but soft coloring. No complex shadows, no paper textures, no vector illustrations, no PPT slide structures.

Typography & Title:
At the top, a prominent handwritten bold Chinese title: "思念的暗面" with a cute hand-drawn teardrop next to it. Below it, a smaller handwritten Chinese subtitle: "两个人各自独处时的无声磨损".
CRITICAL TYPOGRAPHY RULE: ALL Chinese text on the image MUST be strictly rendered in a cute, rounded, bold handwritten Chinese calligraphy font. No digital computer fonts.

Layout & Logic Flow:
A structured diagram showing 4 rounded hand-drawn boxes connected by curving orange flow arrows.
In the center, a connection box: "等待 → 磨损 → 变轻".

Box 1: "玛丽亚的恐惧"
- Marked with a colored badge circled number "1".
- Subtitle: "她怕的不是距离，是沉默".
- Inside sketch: A woman's silhouette standing alone looking at an empty horizon with the words faintly fading around her.

Box 2: "加缪的悲哀"
- Marked with a colored badge circled number "2".
- Subtitle: "散步的时候都拖着一份无声的悲哀".
- Inside sketch: A lone figure walking on an empty path under gray clouds, carrying invisible heaviness.

Box 3: "共同的磨损"
- Marked with a colored badge circled number "3".
- Subtitle: "我不存在，我等待着可以存在".
- Inside sketch: Two half-faded silhouettes on opposite sides of a torn letter, each dissolving at the edges.

Box 4: "信纸底下"
- Marked with a colored badge circled number "4".
- Subtitle: "滚烫的话语盖不住分别的磨损".
- Inside sketch: A stack of warm glowing letters, but with cracks and shadows seeping through from underneath.

Characters & IP:
Include two characters placed naturally:
1. A cute hand-drawn girl with long straight dark brown hair (center part, no bangs), wearing a thick white knit sweater with visible cable-knit texture and light-colored pants. She has a warm, slightly melancholic expression.
2. A cute simple white helper robot with a rounded head and two small antennas on top, rectangular screen face with two dot eyes.
CRITICAL: Do NOT write any name label such as "嗯哌" anywhere on the image.

Color Palette:
Dark gray outlines. Soft muted blues and grays for melancholy. Pastel yellow for warmth in the letters. Curving flow arrows in light hand-drawn orange. Sparse muted red highlights.

Constraints:
Ensure the layout is spacious and readable. All Chinese titles and annotations must be beautifully handwritten. The entire structure must feel logically clear. Do not print any raw English tags. All text shown on the image must be in Chinese.

Generate one standalone 16:9 Chinese methodology infographic about the art of letter-writing and its meaning.

Visual Style:
Pure white background, clean and minimalist. Warm hand-drawn sketch style with soft pencil/ink lines and colored-pencil/light watercolor textures. Sparse, cozy hand-drawn details. High contrast but soft coloring. No complex shadows, no paper textures, no vector illustrations, no PPT slide structures.

Typography & Title:
At the top, a prominent handwritten bold Chinese title: "信纸的时代" with a cute hand-drawn envelope icon next to it. Below it, a smaller handwritten Chinese subtitle: "想象力、沉淀与两个完整灵魂的相遇".
CRITICAL TYPOGRAPHY RULE: ALL Chinese text on the image MUST be strictly rendered in a cute, rounded, bold handwritten Chinese calligraphy font. No digital computer fonts.

Layout & Logic Flow:
A structured diagram showing 4 rounded hand-drawn boxes connected by curving orange flow arrows forming a circle or spiral.
In the center, a small connection box: "分离 → 想象 → 沉淀 → 相遇".

Box 1: "想象力在分离时才起作用"
- Marked with a colored badge circled number "1".
- Subtitle: "思念为彼此的人生补白".
- Inside sketch: A person sitting at a desk at night, window open to stars, imagination blooming like clouds above the paper.

Box 2: "慢沉淀 vs 即时通讯"
- Marked with a colored badge circled number "2".
- Subtitle: "情绪慢慢沉淀，真诚不带一丝敷衍".
- Inside sketch: A split scene — left side shows a hand slowly writing with a fountain pen, ink well nearby; right side shows a blurry fast-moving smartphone screen, dividing line between them.

Box 3: "旁人的执着是打扰"
- Marked with a colored badge circled number "3".
- Subtitle: "加缪的克制才是契合".
- Inside sketch: Two contrasting shapes — a heavy sharp angular shape pushing forward, and two soft rounded shapes gently fitting together like puzzle pieces.

Box 4: "两个完整的人"
- Marked with a colored badge circled number "4".
- Subtitle: "把自己写给对方，写了十六年".
- Inside sketch: Two figures on opposite sides of the frame, each holding a letter, connected by a flowing ribbon of handwritten words across time.

Characters & IP:
Include two characters placed naturally:
1. A cute hand-drawn girl with long straight dark brown hair (center part, no bangs), wearing a thick white knit sweater with visible cable-knit texture and light-colored pants. She is sitting at a wooden desk, writing a letter with a fountain pen, looking peaceful and focused.
2. A cute simple white helper robot with a rounded head and two small antennas on top, rectangular screen face with two dot eyes, holding a sealed envelope beside her.
CRITICAL: Do NOT write any name label such as "嗯哌" anywhere on the image.

Color Palette:
Dark gray outlines. Soft warm sepia and cream tones for the letter-writing atmosphere. Pastel blue and yellow tints for imagination. Curving flow arrows in light hand-drawn orange. Sparse warm brown/amber accents.

Constraints:
Ensure the layout is spacious and readable. All Chinese titles and annotations must be beautifully handwritten. The entire structure must feel logically clear, structured, and easy to follow at a glance. Do not print any raw English tags. All text shown on the image must be in Chinese.
